006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import static java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter.*;
020import static java.time.temporal.ChronoUnit.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023
024import java.time.*;
025import java.util.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027
028
029/**
030 * Represents an HTTP <c>If-Range</c> header.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * If the entity is unchanged, send me the part(s) that I am missing; otherwise, send me the entire new entity.
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
037 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
038 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
039 * (and possibly earlier).
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
043 * </ul>
044 *
045 * @since 9.2.1
046 */
047@SuppressWarnings({
048   "java:S2160" // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue()
049})
050public class IfRange extends HttpHeaderBean {
051
052   /** The header name */
053   public static final String NAME = "If-Range";
054
055   private static boolean isEtag(String s) {
056      return s != null && (s.startsWith("\"") || s.startsWith("W/"));
057   }
058
059   private final EntityTag etagValue;
060   private final ZonedDateTime zonedValue;
061   private final Supplier<?> supplier;
062
063   /**
064    * Constructor with an entity-tag value.
065    *
066    * @param value The entity tag. May be <jk>null</jk>.
067    */
068   public IfRange(EntityTag value) {
069      super(NAME, (String)null);
070      this.etagValue = value;
071      this.zonedValue = null;
072      this.supplier = null;
073   }
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor with a wire string (HTTP-date or entity-tag).
077    *
078    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
079    */
080   public IfRange(String value) {
081      super(NAME, (String)null);
082      if (value != null && isEtag(value)) {
083         this.etagValue = EntityTag.of(value);
084         this.zonedValue = null;
085      } else {
086         this.etagValue = null;
087         this.zonedValue = e(value) ? null : parseHttpDate(value);
088      }
089      this.supplier = null;
090   }
091
092   /**
093    * Constructor with a lazy supplier of {@link EntityTag} or {@link ZonedDateTime}.
094    *
095    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
096    */
097   public IfRange(Supplier<?> valueSupplier) {
098      super(NAME, (String)null);
099      this.etagValue = null;
100      this.zonedValue = null;
101      this.supplier = valueSupplier;
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Constructor with an HTTP-date.
106    *
107    * @param value The date/time. May be <jk>null</jk>.
108    */
109   public IfRange(ZonedDateTime value) {
110      super(NAME, (String)null);
111      this.etagValue = null;
112      this.zonedValue = value;
113      this.supplier = null;
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * @return This header as an {@link EntityTag}.
118    */
119   public Optional<EntityTag> asEntityTag() {
120      if (nn(supplier)) {
121         var o = supplier.get();
122         return opt(o instanceof EntityTag o2 ? o2 : null);
123      }
124      return opt(etagValue);
125   }
126
127   /**
128    * @return This header as a {@link ZonedDateTime} when the value is an HTTP-date.
129    */
130   public Optional<ZonedDateTime> asZonedDateTime() {
131      if (nn(supplier)) {
132         var o = supplier.get();
133         return opt(o instanceof ZonedDateTime o2 ? o2 : null);
134      }
135      return opt(zonedValue);
136   }
137
138   @Override /* HttpHeader */
139   public String getValue() {
140      if (nn(supplier)) {
141         var o = supplier.get();
142         if (o == null)
143            return null;
144         if (o instanceof EntityTag o2)
145            return o2.toString();
146         if (o instanceof ZonedDateTime o2)
147            return RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.format(o2);
148         throw rex("Invalid object type returned by supplier: {0}", cn(o));
149      }
150      if (nn(etagValue))
151         return s(etagValue);
152      if (nn(zonedValue))
153         return RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.format(zonedValue);
154      return null;
155   }
156
157   /**
158    * Static factory with an entity-tag.
159    *
160    * @param value The tag. May be <jk>null</jk>.
161    * @return A new instance or <jk>null</jk>.
162    */
163   public static IfRange of(EntityTag value) {
164      return value == null ? null : new IfRange(value);
165   }
166
167   /**
168    * Static factory with a wire string.
169    *
170    * @param value The value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
171    * @return A new instance or <jk>null</jk>.
172    */
173   public static IfRange of(String value) {
174      return value == null ? null : new IfRange(value);
175   }
176
177   /**
178    * Static factory with a lazy supplier.
179    *
180    * @param valueSupplier Supplier of {@link EntityTag} or {@link ZonedDateTime}. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
181    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
182    */
183   public static IfRange of(Supplier<?> valueSupplier) {
184      return new IfRange(valueSupplier);
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Static factory with an HTTP-date.
189    *
190    * @param value The date/time. May be <jk>null</jk>.
191    * @return A new instance or <jk>null</jk>.
192    */
193   public static IfRange of(ZonedDateTime value) {
194      return value == null ? null : new IfRange(value);
195   }
196
197   private static ZonedDateTime parseHttpDate(String value) {
198      return ZonedDateTime.from(RFC_1123_DATE_TIME.parse(value)).truncatedTo(SECONDS);
199   }
200}
